name: Someone is behind you
short_description: A dark 3D game in which the player must escape from a maze full of mysterious rooms. There's a monster lurking around every corner, ready to give chase. Dynamic gameplay keeps the player in constant tension. Will you dare to face your worst nightmares and find your way to freedom?
detailed_description:
A dark 3D game in which the player must escape from an endless maze full of mysterious rooms. Escape is not easy - there is a monster lurking around every corner, ready to give chase. Dynamic gameplay and unexpected jumpscares keep the player in constant suspense. Will you dare to face your worst nightmares and find your way to freedom?

"Someone is behind you – A short, intense horror that pulls you into an atmosphere of constant tension. In the nightmare maze, every step could be your last... Do you dare to look back?"

Could you escape this cursed maze? Will the monster lurking in the dark get you?

"A short storygame, but without a story" - K. Zietek
